channel.title: WeeklySeries on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in WeeklySeries on Zymacs

item.title: Last week in code -001-
item.description: Last week in code -001- The beginning of a new chapter I find I always have a whole lot to talk about at the end of every week. And that most of it is from the tech space. I attend this Software Club meeting every Thursday where I try to use some of that time to talk about the latest developments with people who get it. We exchange opinions on things we’re building.
